titleStmt.title: SII 26.730: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 730. (A.R. No. 679 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same shrine.
This inscription is damaged and incomplete.

It records that a liṅga called Ulaganādīśvaram-uḍaiyār was set up in the first prākāra of the temple of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam-uḍaiyār, for the merit of Viḷambakuḍaiyāṉ Tillai Tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ alias Viśaiyālaya Muttaraiyar of Viḷambakuḍi in Pāṇḍikulāśaṉi-vaḷanāḍu, by his son Āḷuḍaiyapiḷḷaiyāraḍiyān Iḍarkaḷaivān alias Anapāyamuttaraiyan. It is further stated that permission to set up the liṅga was obtained by the donor from Tribhuvanavīradēvar described as Periyadēvar at his camp in the Irāśarāśa-maṇḍapa at Ūṟṟattūr. It records that the donor made a gift of some land in Tiyāgavallich-chatuppēdimaṅgalam purchased from its sabhai as kuḍinīṅgā-dēvadānam, to provide for worship to the liṅga Ulaganādīśvaram-uḍaiyār. It is stated that the income of paddy at 30 kalam per vēli was to be paid to the temple Śībaṇḍāram.
Also records some other gifts to the priests to provide for clothes to the image of the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 vatu pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu viḷampikuṭiv
viḷampikuṭaiyān tillaitirunaṭṭapperumāḷāna vicaiyālaya muttaraiyar piḷḷaikaḷil Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyā
raṭiyāna Iṭarkaḷaivānāna Anapāya muttaraiyane viḷampakuṭi viḷampakuṭaiyān tillaitirunaṭṭapperumāḷā
na vicaiyālaiya muttaraiyāḷan ntu vāḻvitta ku kurukkaḷumāy nān pūcikka En kaiyile Inakku nāyanā
raiyum Eḻuti t tanta Ivaṟku naṉṟākac civaliṅkap piratiṭṭai paṇṇaveṇumennu Ivaruṭaiya
makkaḷil Ulakāṇṭārāna vicaiyālaiya muttaraiyaṟkuc colli Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅkaḷamuṭaiyār ko
yil mutal pirākārattu nāṉ Eḻuntaruḷa viṇṇappañceyta Uṭaiyār Ulaka- nātiśvaramuṭaiyāṟkut tevatā
namāka nān Ūṟṟattūril Āṉaippūca ṭṭi veṭṭi periyatevar tiripuvanaviratevar tirumun Irācarācamaṇṭa
pattup pirasātañ ceytaruḷiya ṟaiyiṭṭut tiyākavalliccatuppetimaṅkalattu sabhai
nān vilaikoṇṭa nāyanāṟkuk kuṭiniṅkāttevatāna
māvatākavum Innilattāl vanta kaṭamai kuṭimai Uḷḷiṭṭanavum puka �yu na payir Uḷḷiṭṭana Innāyanāṟkup pū
caikkuṭalāka Iṟaiyiliyākki koḷvatenṟu cāmantanār viṭṭapaṭiye Ellā Āyaṅkaḷum vācikaḷum
tuṇṭaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa veli muppatin kalamāka vanta nel nittamaṇavāḷaṉ marakkālāle ciyapa
ṇṭārattile Iṟukkakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭikaḷpalatum Uṭaiyār Ulakanātiśvaramuṭaiyā
r koyil tevaiyum mallatu maṟṟuc cila Āḷ tevai Uḷḷiṭṭana Onṟum ceyyak kaṭavatal
latākavum Innilattil kāṭuṅ karampaiyu Uṭpaṭa nān kāṇiyākak kuṭuttapaṭi Entevarātti
l nāyanār ṭaiyāṟku nilam 1 mūn_ṛumā � ¿ 1muntirim Iṟai mikuti koṇṭu Innāyanāṟkup pūcai
cellavum Eṉṉuṭaiya mutaliyār piḷḷaikaḷil Ā ṭaiyāṟku nilam
Ulakanātiśvaramuṭaiyāraip pūcikka Āṭaiyaṇi nivantamākattan nilat tiṟaiyilikkāṇiyāy niṉṟu mi kār
navirai Uḷpaṭa niṉṟu pūcaippeṟṟuk kuṭalākavum Innāyanār koyil śivabrāmaṇakkā ppa
ttile pattu nāḷ kāṇiyākak kuṭutte Uḻutiṟukkuṭi nilam Ivar nampiyār tirunaṭṭapperumāḷukku nilam pa
vampāṉṟāḷ Ammaikku nilam 4mām Alliyaṅkotai nācciyāṟku nilam (1/4) �m periyanācciyāṟku nilam vum m
Iṭarkaḷaivāṉukku nilam namakku nila perumāḷukku nilam (1/4)mā� tevarkaḷ tampirāṭṭiyāṟku nilam
tirumañcanamaḻakiyāḷukku nilam ç nta kiḻakku vitiviṭaṅkapperumāḷukku nilam (1/2)m Āka nilam 4 mukkāl 2mā � ¿ 1muntiri kiśakku mukkāl mūn_ṛumā
Iṉ nilam(m) nālemukkāle Iraṇṭu mā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ mukkāle muṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum IppaṭiIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.730 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
